description: Create a list-only tracking module named 'Decay_Monitor' configured to show specific numerical telemetry (Altitude, Velocity, and Orbit Number) for large space structures, and bind it to a new Space Control Center ground station named 'Vandenberg_SCC' (34.7420 N, 120.5724 W, 112m, Weather Station KVBG). The module must track ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544), CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274), and SUOMI NPP (NORAD 37849) using the Vandenberg_SCC station for its calculations. Ensure the 'Decay_Monitor' layout displays only the Satellite List and is the active tab. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
